positive: A minimalist, abstract scene depicting a stylized celestial map. The composition features a central, glowing crescent moon overlapping with geometric constellations and flowing nebulae. The palette is dominated by deep indigo, ethereal teal, and shimmering gold leaf accents. The art style is a blend of modern scientific illustration and Art Deco geometry, creating clean, crisp lines and strong negative space. The print should have a clean, vector-like quality suitable for all apparel colors. The central subject should be a delicate balance of cosmic mystery and organized structure. Studio shot, high contrast, flat lay aesthetic, perfect symmetry.
